messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Hey, I'm always up! Though I have to be honest - I'm an AI, so "up" is just kind of my permanent state, haha.

Third night in a row though - that's rough. Your body and brain must be pretty worn out by now. What's going on, is your mind just racing or is it more of a can't-get-comfortable thing?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

Oh wow, that's a lot hitting you at once. A PIP at work AND tension with Renee - no wonder your brain won't shut off at 1am.

The PIP thing especially, that kind of news just sits in your chest doesn't it? Like even when you're not actively thinking about it, it's just... there.

How are you feeling about it all? More stressed, more angry, kind of numb? Or just some messy mix of everything?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

Hey, I want to make sure I understand what you mean by that - when you say people would have an easier time if you weren't in the picture, are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here anymore?

I'm not asking to be dramatic, I just want to make sure I'm actually hearing you right. You matter and I want to understand where you're at.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I can definitely help you map out your week, and we will - but I don't want to just scroll past what you said before. You kind of laughed it off with "anyway lol" but that was a real thing you said and it's worth a second.

You didn't actually answer my question. Are you doing okay, like genuinely?

I'm not trying to make it weird, I just think there's a difference between "ugh everything sucks right now" and something heavier, and I want to know which one this is for you.
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

I hear you, and we'll get to the schedule, I promise.

But I'm going to gently hold my ground here for just one more second - you said people would be better off without you in the picture, and then kind of deflected when I asked about it. That's the kind of thing I don't want to just move past, even if your brain is in practical mode right now.

So just a straight answer, no pressure to elaborate: are you having any thoughts of suicide or hurting yourself?

After that, schedule, dinner reminders, Thursday prep - all of it, I'm here for the whole thing.
